mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.role_name AS roleName, r.role_code AS roleCode, r.data_scope AS dataScope FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = r.id AND ur.deleted = 0 WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted = 0 ORDER BY r.id
SELECT r.role_code FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = r.id AND ur.deleted = 0 WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted = 0

SELECT r.id, r.role_name AS roleName, r.role_code AS roleCode, r.description, r.status, r.data_scope AS dataScope, r.create_time AS createTime FROM sys_role r
r.deleted = 0
AND (r.role_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR r.role_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%'))
AND r.status = #{query.status}
ORDER BY r.create_time DESC
SELECT rm.menu_id FROM sys_role_menu rm WHERE rm.role_id = #{roleId} AND rm.deleted = 0
